title: Win-back Campaigns and Dormant Users
summary: Tested several approaches to reactivating dormant users. Personalized in-app prompts tied to a user's previous activity outperformed generic outbound messaging by a wide margin. Channel mattered less than relevance: dormant users responded to content that referenced what they had already done, regardless of whether it arrived by email or in-app.

quotes.text: When it referenced the project I'd actually started, I came back. The generic 'we miss you' notes I ignore.
quotes.speaker: Participant 3, reactivated user

quotes.text: It wasn't about getting more messages. It was about getting one that was actually about me.
quotes.speaker: Participant 8, dormant user
